//: Dev-only type-checking of the static map's plain-JS ES modules (site/map). NOT a build step — `noEmit`, nothing compiles, the .js ships verbatim (the site is no-bundler). `checkJs` surfaces `Cannot find name` for any cross-module reference that isn't imported/declared — the ReferenceError-blank-page risk of the ES-module split. Run: `pixi run check-frontend`.
